examples: In 1979's Norma Rae, Field played the title role in the tale of a Southern mill worker's fight to unionise her workplace.
Tellingly, all votes held to unionise Wal-Mart stores have ended in failure.
Encountering American activist Sam (Adrien Brody) during one of his guerrilla-style stunts to raise awareness for the janitors' plight, Maya encourages her co-workers to unionise.
